name: xwebagent
description: XWebAgent Extension – A Chrome extension that makes browsing Safe 🛡️, Fun 😄, and Efficient 🚀

scripts.e2e:unit: npm run e2e:install && npx --prefix e2e-tests jest unit/logic.test.js
scripts.e2e:e2e: npm run e2e:install && npx --prefix e2e-tests playwright install --with-deps chromium && cd e2e-tests && npx playwright test
scripts.ci: npm run e2e:manifest && npm run e2e:unit && npm run e2e:e2e
